note: Wyre limited customers to withdrawing 90% of account assets.
The Crypto Times reported the withdrawal limit applied to all users.
Ledger said the Wyre-powered buy/swap service was temporarily unavailable.
The withdrawal cap arrived amid reports that a shutdown was imminent.
Wyre named a former risk and compliance executive as interim CEO during the stress period.
Wyre lifted the withdrawal limit after securing financing from a strategic partner.
A 90% cap implied 10% of each customer account remained non-withdrawable under the policy.
